since_last: 52% of 100 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.08%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 52% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.54% · BTC -0.30% · Gold +0.92% · Nasdaq100 -0.68%. 52% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.08%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.08%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.25%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -12.79%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +7.93%, MU +5.17%, LEU +5.13%, ORCL +3.21%, DELL +3.06%. Laggards: ISRG -12.79%, PUBM -5.39%, BIDU -3.98%, SNAP -3.94%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.76% at $126.18
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.76% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
